text: AI systems that deploy subliminal techniques beyond a person's consciousness to materially distort behaviour are prohibited.
penalty_description: Administrative fines up to EUR 35,000,000 or 7% of total worldwide annual turnover

text: AI systems identified as high-risk shall comply with the requirements set out in Chapter III.
High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed with capabilities enabling the automatic recording of events ('logs') while the high-risk AI systems is operating.

Providers of AI systems, including GPAI models, shall ensure that AI systems intended to directly interact with natural persons are designed and developed in such a way that the natural persons are informed that they are interacting with an AI system.
AI systems that generate or manipulate image, audio or video content constituting a deepfake shall disclose that the content has been artificially generated or manipulated.
penalty_description: Fines up to EUR 15,000,000 or 3% of worldwide annual turnover

text: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are established, transparent, and implemented.
Regular testing, review, and monitoring of AI system effectiveness are performed.
Non-compliance with the provisions of Articles 5 and 10 shall be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 35,000,000 or 7% of total worldwide annual turnover.
